core: Deadly Demise D3 , Deep Strike , Firing Deck 11

datasheet.text: In your Shooting phase , when you select this model to shoot, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this model. While Empowered, if one or more units are embarked within this model, each time this model makes an attack with a ranged weapon that has the [ANTI] ability, you can re-roll the Hit roll .
datasheet.name: Splinter Racks (Pain)

datasheet.text: At the start of your Command phase , select one of the abilities in the Vanguard of the Dark City section (see above) for this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.
datasheet.name: Vanguard of the Dark City

entries.label: This model’s dark lance can be replaced with 1 disintegrator cannon.

entries.text: At the end of your Command phase , if this model is within range of an objective marker you control, and if one or more KABALITE WARRIORS units are embarked within it, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.
entries.label: Masters of the Shadowed Sky

entries.text: Each time a WYCHES unit disembarks from this model (excluding Emergency Disembarkations ), models in that WYCHES unit must be set up wholly within 6" of this model.
entries.label: Speed of the Kill

entries.text: While one or more WRACKS units are embarked within this model, for each WRACKS model embarked within this model, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s bladevanes and chainsnares.
entries.label: Visions of Butchery

entries.text: While one or more DRUKHARI units are embarked within this model, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.
entries.label: Aethersails
CORE

entries.text: This model has a transport capacity of 11 DRUKHARI INFANTRY models (excluding JUMP PACK models).
